name: Toward Robust In-Context Segmentation via Concept Guidance

description: arXiv:2606.28149v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: In-context segmentation (ICS) requires a model to segment target regions in a query image using only a few reference images and their corresponding masks, without updating any parameters. Despite recent progress, prior ICS studies have largely overlooked a critical aspect: system robustness, ie, whether the model can produce stable segme...
author: Zhigang Chen, Xiawu Zheng, Rongrong Ji
